translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Paul and Timotheus, servants of Jesus Christ, to all the saints in Christ Jesus who are in Philippi, with overseers and ministrants;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Grace to you, and peace from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I give thanks to my God upon all the remembrance of you,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: always, in every supplication of mine for you all, with joy making the supplication,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for your contribution to the good news from the first day till now,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: having been confident of this very thing, that He who did begin in you a good work, will perform [it] till a day of Jesus Christ,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: according as it is righteous for me to think this in behalf of you all, because of my having you in the heart, both in my bonds, and [in] the defence and confirmation of the good news, all of you being fellow-partakers with me of grace.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For God is my witness, how I long for you all in the bowels of Jesus Christ,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and this I pray, that your love yet more and more may abound in full knowledge, and all judgment,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for your proving the things that differ, that ye may be pure and offenceless -- to a day of Christ,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: being filled with the fruit of righteousness, that [is] through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I wish you to know, brethren, that the things concerning me, rather to an advancement of the good news have come,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: so that my bonds have become manifest in Christ in the whole praetorium, and to the other places -- all,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the greater part of the brethren in the Lord, having confidence by my bonds, are more abundantly bold -- fearlessly to speak the word.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Certain, indeed, even through envy and contention, and certain also through good-will, do preach the Christ;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: the one, indeed, of rivalry the Christ do proclaim, not purely, supposing to add affliction to my bonds,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the other out of love, having known that for defence of the good news I am set:

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: what then? in every way, whether in pretence or in truth, Christ is proclaimed -- and in this I rejoice, yea, and shall rejoice.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For I have known that this shall fall out to me for salvation, through your supplication, and the supply of the Spirit of Christ Jesus,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: according to my earnest expectation and hope, that in nothing I shall be ashamed, and in all freedom, as always, also now Christ shall be magnified in my body, whether through life or through death,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for to me to live [is] Christ, and to die gain.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And if to live in the flesh [is] to me a fruit of work, then what shall I choose? I know not;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for I am pressed by the two, having the desire to depart, and to be with Christ, for it is far better,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and to remain in the flesh is more necessary on your account,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and of this being persuaded, I have known that I shall remain and continue with you all, to your advancement and joy of the faith,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: that your boasting may abound in Christ Jesus in me through my presence again to you.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Only worthily of the good news of the Christ conduct ye yourselves, that, whether having come and seen you, whether being absent I may hear of the things concerning you, that ye stand fast in one spirit, with one soul, striving together for the faith of the good news,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and not terrified in anything by those opposing, which to them indeed is a token of destruction, and to you of salvation, and that from God;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: because to you it was granted, on behalf of Christ, not only to believe in him, but also on behalf of him to suffer;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: the same conflict having, such as ye saw in me, and now hear of in me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: If, then, any exhortation [is] in Christ, if any comfort of love, if any fellowship of spirit, if any bowels and mercies,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: fulfil ye my joy, that ye may mind the same thing -- having the same love -- of one soul -- minding the one thing,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: nothing in rivalry or vain-glory, but in humility of mind one another counting more excellent than yourselves --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: each not to your own look ye, but each also to the things of others.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For, let this mind be in you that [is] also in Christ Jesus,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: who, being in the form of God, thought [it] not robbery to be equal to God,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: but did empty himself, the form of a servant having taken, in the likeness of men having been made,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and in fashion having been found as a man, he humbled himself, having become obedient unto death -- death even of a cross,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: wherefore, also, God did highly exalt him, and gave to him a name that [is] above every name,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: that in the name of Jesus every knee may bow -- of heavenlies, and earthlies, and what are under the earth --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and every tongue may confess that Jesus Christ [is] Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: So that, my beloved, as ye always obey, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, with fear and trembling your own salvation work out,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for God it is who is working in you both to will and to work for His good pleasure.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All things do without murmurings and reasonings,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: that ye may become blameless and harmless, children of God, unblemished in the midst of a generation crooked and perverse, among whom ye do appear as luminaries in the world,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: the word of life holding forth, for rejoicing to me in regard to a day of Christ, that not in vain did I run, nor in vain did I labour;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: but if also I am poured forth upon the sacrifice and service of your faith, I rejoice and joy with you all,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: because of this do ye also rejoice and joy with me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I hope, in the Lord Jesus, Timotheus to send quickly to you, that I also may be of good spirit, having known the things concerning you,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for I have no one like-minded, who sincerely for the things concerning you will care,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for the whole seek their own things, not the things of the Christ Jesus,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the proof of him ye know, that as a child [serveth] a father, with me he did serve in regard to the good news;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: him, indeed, therefore, I hope to send, when I may see through the things concerning me -- immediately;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and I trust in the Lord that I myself also shall quickly come.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I thought [it] necessary Epaphroditus -- my brother, and fellow-workman, and fellow-soldier, and your apostle and servant to my need -- to send unto you,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: seeing he was longing after you all, and in heaviness, because ye heard that he ailed,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for he also ailed nigh to death, but God did deal kindly with him, and not with him only, but also with me, that sorrow upon sorrow I might not have.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The more eagerly, therefore, I did send him, that having seen him again ye may rejoice, and I may be the less sorrowful;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: receive him, therefore, in the Lord, with all joy, and hold such in honour,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: because on account of the work of the Christ he drew near to death, having hazarded the life that he might fill up your deficiency of service unto me.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: As to the rest, my brethren, rejoice in the Lord; the same things to write to you to me indeed is not tiresome, and for you [is] sure;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: look to the dogs, look to the evil-workers, look to the concision;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for we are the circumcision, who by the Spirit are serving God, and glorying in Christ Jesus, and in flesh having no trust,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: though I also have [cause of] trust in flesh. If any other one doth think to have trust in flesh, I more;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: circumcision on the eighth day! of the race of Israel! of the tribe of Benjamin! a Hebrew of Hebrews! according to law a Pharisee!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: according to zeal persecuting the assembly! according to righteousness that is in law becoming blameless!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: But what things were to me gains, these I have counted, because of the Christ, loss;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: yes, indeed, and I count all things to be loss, because of the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus my Lord, because of whom of the all things I suffered loss, and do count them to be refuse, that Christ I may gain, and be found in him,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: not having my righteousness, which [is] of law, but that which [is] through faith of Christ -- the righteousness that is of God by the faith,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: to know him, and the power of his rising again, and the fellowship of his sufferings, being conformed to his death,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: if anyhow I may attain to the rising again of the dead.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Not that I did already obtain, or have been already perfected; but I pursue, if also I may lay hold of that for which also I was laid hold of by the Christ Jesus;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: brethren, I do not reckon myself to have laid hold; and one thing -- the things behind indeed forgetting, and to the things before stretching forth --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: to the mark I pursue for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: As many, therefore, as [are] perfect -- let us think this, and if [in] anything ye think otherwise, this also shall God reveal to you,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: but to what we have come -- by the same rule walk, the same thing think;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: become followers together of me, brethren, and observe those thus walking, according as ye have us -- a pattern;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for many walk of whom many times I told you -- and now also weeping tell -- the enemies of the cross of the Christ!

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: whose end [is] destruction, whose god [is] the belly, and whose glory [is] in their shame, who the things on earth are minding.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For our citizenship is in the heavens, whence also a Saviour we await -- the Lord Jesus Christ --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: who shall transform the body of our humiliation to its becoming conformed to the body of his glory, according to the working of his power, even to subject to himself the all things.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: So then, my brethren, beloved and longed for, my joy and crown, so stand ye in the Lord, beloved.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Euodia I exhort, and Syntyche I exhort, to be of the same mind in the Lord;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and I ask also thee, genuine yoke-fellow, be assisting those women who in the good news did strive along with me, with Clement also, and the others, my fellow-workers, whose names [are] in the book of life.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Rejoice in the Lord always; again I will say, rejoice;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: let your forbearance be known to all men; the Lord [is] near;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for nothing be anxious, but in everything by prayer, and by supplication, with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known unto God;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the peace of God, that is surpassing all understanding, shall guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: As to the rest, brethren, as many things as are true, as many as [are] grave, as many as [are] righteous, as many as [are] pure, as many as [are] lovely, as many as [are] of good report, if any worthiness, and if any praise, these things think upon;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: the things that also ye did learn, and receive, and hear, and saw in me, those do, and the God of the peace shall be with you.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And I rejoiced in the Lord greatly, that now at length ye flourished again in caring for me, for which also ye were caring, and lacked opportunity;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: not that in respect of want I say [it], for I did learn in the things in which I am -- to be content;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: I have known both to be abased, and I have known to abound; in everything and in all things I have been initiated, both to be full and to be hungry, both to abound and to be in want.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: For all things I have strength, in Christ's strengthening me;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: but ye did well, having communicated with my tribulation;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and ye have known, even ye Philippians, that in the beginning of the good news when I went forth from Macedonia, no assembly did communicate with me in regard to giving and receiving except ye only;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: because also in Thessalonica, both once and again to my need ye sent;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: not that I seek after the gift, but I seek after the fruit that is overflowing to your account;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and I have all things, and abound; I am filled, having received from Epaphroditus the things from you -- an odour of a sweet smell -- a sacrifice acceptable, well-pleasing to God:

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and my God shall supply all your need, according to His riches in glory in Christ Jesus;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and to God, even our Father, [is] the glory -- to the ages of the ages. Amen.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Salute ye every saint in Christ Jesus; there salute you the brethren with me;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: there salute you all the saints, and specially those of Caesar's house;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [is] with you all. Amen.
